meta.project: MX (Mezzo) - Meal Ordering and Restaurant Management System

product_overview: MX (Mezzo) is a themed food ordering web app that lets customers browse a menu, manage a cart, place orders, and track account/order information. It also includes an authenticated operator portal for managing orders, menu content, coupons, and delivery settings.
core_goals: Add items to cart and adjust quantities
Complete an order with delivery or pickup details
View account details and order history
Track active order status from the storefront
Manage orders, menu content, coupons, and delivery configuration

features.name: Menu browsing and cart management
features.description: Customers can explore the storefront menu, add products to the cart, and update cart contents before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse categories and menu items -> Add a product to the cart -> Open the cart panel -> Increase or decrease item quantities -> Remove an item if desired -> Close the cart panel
Navigate to / -> Browse categories and menu items -> Add multiple products to the cart -> Open the cart panel -> Review selected items and quantities -> Continue shopping with the cart retained

features.name: Checkout and order creation
features.description: Customers can enter delivery or pickup details, choose a fulfillment method, and submit an order.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the cart panel -> Start checkout -> Enter phone details -> Enter customer and address details -> Select delivery method -> Confirm the order -> See the order success message with an order number

Navigate to / -> Open the cart panel -> Start checkout -> Enter phone details -> Enter customer and address details -> Select pickup instead of delivery -> Confirm the order -> See the order success message with an order number

features.name: Customer profile and order tracking
features.description: Customers can open their account area to view profile information, settings, and order history, and jump to active order tracking from the storefront.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the account/profile panel -> View account settings -> Switch to the order history view -> Review past orders
Navigate to / -> Open the pending order banner -> Navigate to the highlighted active order -> View the current order status
Navigate to / -> Open the account/profile panel -> Enter or confirm the linked phone information -> Review the matched account data

features.name: Coupon unlock and apply flow
features.description: Customers can unlock coupons with a cheat code and apply valid coupons during checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter a cheat code to unlock a coupon -> Open the checkout flow -> Review the available coupons -> Apply an eligible coupon -> Confirm the order
Navigate to / -> Open the checkout flow -> Review the available coupons -> Try to apply an invalid or expired coupon -> See a coupon validation error

features.name: Operator management dashboard
features.description: Authenticated operators can access the management portal to review orders, maintain menu data, and adjust system settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /operator -> Authenticate into the operator portal -> Open the orders view -> Review live orders -> Update an order status -> Switch to archived orders -> Review completed order history

Navigate to /operator -> Authenticate into the operator portal -> Open the items and categories management views -> Create a category -> Create a menu item -> Edit an existing category or item -> Delete an unneeded category or item
Navigate to /operator -> Authenticate into the operator portal -> Open the settings and delivery configuration views -> Review settings -> Update delivery zones or service layers -> Save the changes

routes.description: Customer storefront for browsing menu, managing cart, checkout, and account/profile access.
Operator portal entry point that shows login or dashboard based on operator authentication state.

features.name: Menu browsing and cart management
features.description: Customers browse categories/items, add products to cart, and adjust quantities before checkout.
user_interactions: Browse categories and menu items on the main page.
Tap add-to-cart on products.
Increase, decrease, or remove cart quantities.
Open and close the cart panel.

features.name: Checkout and order creation
features.description: Customers provide delivery/pickup details, apply coupons, and submit orders with payment method.
user_interactions: Open checkout from cart.
Enter phone and customer/address details.
Select delivery method and map location if needed.
Confirm order and view success modal with order number.

features.name: Customer profile and order tracking
features.description: Customers can access account/profile data and track active order status from the storefront.
user_interactions: Open account/profile panel.
View settings and order history tabs.
Navigate to highlighted active orders from the pending banner.
Validate phone-linked account data.

features.name: Coupon unlock and apply flow
features.description: Customers can unlock coupons and apply eligible coupons during checkout.
user_interactions: Enter a cheat code to unlock a coupon.
Review available coupons during checkout.
Apply a coupon before confirming order.
See coupon validation errors if invalid or expired.

features.name: Operator management dashboard
features.description: Authenticated operators manage orders, items, categories, analytics, settings, and delivery configuration.
user_interactions: Open operator route and authenticate.
Review and update live/archived orders.
Create/edit/delete categories and items.
Manage settings, delivery zones, and service layers.

known_limitations.issue: Routing is handled with direct pathname checks instead of a dedicated router, limiting route scalability.
known_limitations.impact: Adding nested routes, route guards, and route-level code splitting is harder to maintain.
